stemHtml: You are the pilot flying an aircraft equipped with EGPWS under IFR and wish to turn to the left to take a shorter route. You check the terrain display, which shows an area of yellow ahead and to the left surrounded by an area of green. The yellow region indicates where the terrain elevation is...

options.a: at the aircraft altitude or NO more than 1000 ft above.
options.b: below the aircraft altitude by more than the required obstacle clearance.
options.c: below the aircraft altitude by less than the required obstacle clearance.
options.d: below the aircraft altitude by at least 500 ft but NO more than 1000 ft.
